_publications._publicationTitle: Global Proteome and Phospho-proteome Analysis of Merlin-deficient Meningioma and Schwannoma Identifies PDLIM2 as a Novel Therapeutic Target.

_contextSnippet: The protein was found overexpressed in four out of the six schwannomas compared to the normal Schwann cell examined
details: Successfully detected PDLIM2 overexpression in 4 out of 6 schwannomas compared to normal Schwann cells, and in all tested meningioma samples compared to controls
